description: Style NoteSuave and sharp is the look you'll get with wills lifestyle's range of classy formal wear. This shirt will add tons of style and an elegant touch to your formal wardrobe. Crafted from stretch fabric to give the perfect Fit, pair it with a formal skirt or trousers and closed toe pumps for a professional look. Product DetailsWhite shirt, has a slim collar which is curved at the edges, full buttoned placket with a flap over it to conceal it except the top button, three quarter sleeves with buttoned cuffs, pint tucks from the yoke to the hem on either side of the placket, back yoke, pin tucks at the back through the centre from the yoke to the hemline and a curved hemlineMaterial and Care100% ramieMachine wash coldDo not bleachLine dryUse warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model height (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
